---
title: "Talks"
---

<div class="page">

# Talks & Presentations

*⭐ indicates invited talk; 🧑‍💼 indicates conference convener role.*

---

## Invited Talks

- **Glaciology Seminars** — Center for Scientific Studies (2021, online)
- **Strategic Water Resources Planning Seminar** — Aysén, Chile (2022)
- **Student for Student Summerschool** — Austria (2022)

## Conference Presentations

- **EGU General Assembly 2026** — Vienna, Austria 🧑‍💼
- **V Congress of the Chilean Cryosphere Society** — Chile (2023)
- **6th OGGM Workshop** — Norway (2022)
- **III Congress of the Chilean Cryosphere Society** — Online (2021)
- **Scientific Meeting of the Argentine Association of Geophysicists and Geodesists** — Online (2021)
- **XXIV Chilean Congress of Hydraulic Engineering** — Chile (2019)
- **XXVIII Latin American Hydraulics Congress** — Argentina (2018)

---

## Other Presentations

- **PatagoniaMet: A quality check observational dataset for Western Patagonia** — Chilean Cryosphere Society (2021)
- **Climate datasets are the main source of uncertainty of glacier evolution** — Student for Student Summerschool (2022)
- **Assessing the glacier projection uncertainties in the Patagonian Andes** — V Chilean Cryosphere Society Congress (2023)

</div>
